falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by more than 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal, indicating a trend reversal rather than consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 50% above the 14-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sudden extreme volume would indicate a breakout or blowoff move, contradicting the HOLD phase and suggesting a clear directional bias.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price fails to break below the 2022 May Luna pattern's confirmed low (e.g., $X.XX) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Failure to retest the prior pattern's critical support level would invalidate the bottoming pattern assumption, suggesting the current setup is not analogous to the 2022 case.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
